content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 21, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 21, 2026, focused on expanding LifeOps capabilities, refining core framework stability, and performing extensive dependency maintenance. Key updates include new scheduling and calendar actions, improved memory sorting for the in-memory adapter, and dynamic prompt formatting support.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### LifeOps Expansion and System Integration
*   Implemented significant updates to `app-lifeops`, including new actions for calendar management, travel booking, scheduling, and cross-platform gateway support ([#6984](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6984)).
*   Restored scenario final-check handlers and integrated `installTaskHeartbeat` into swarm synthesis ([#6972](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6972)).

### Core Framework and Database Improvements
*   Added `PROMPT_OUTPUT_FORMAT` environment variable to `dynamicPromptExecFromState` to improve compatibility with models like Gemini 2.5 Pro and Llama ([#6978](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6978)).
*   Updated `InMemoryDatabaseAdapter.getMemories` to sort results in descending order, ensuring consistency with `plugin-sql` ([#7000](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7000)).

### Dependency and Infrastructure Maintenance
*   Performed widespread dependency updates across the repository, including `vitest` ([#6982](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6982), [#6990](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6990), [#6989](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6989)), `bun` ([#6973](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6973)), and various Rust crates ([#6986](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6986), [#6985](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6985)).
*   Aligned TypeScript type-checking across `lifeops`, `agent`, and `app-core` packages ([#6984](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6984)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   No new pull requests were opened today.

## CLOSED ISSUES

### Feature and Integration Proposals
*   [#7007](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7007): A request for a PII sanitization layer was closed following a rejection of the proposed model usage.
*   [#6977](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6977): A proposal for Merxex integration for agent commerce was closed by maintainers.

## NEW ISSUES

### Security and Privacy
*   [#7007](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7007): A feature request was submitted to implement a PII sanitization layer for data processed by LLMs, which was subsequently closed.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   There are no active issues with more than 3 comments.
